findings.problem: The first recorder block runs as an extended transcript-like exchange before the narration returns to Marisol at line 69. Because the chapter is otherwise close third, this 47-67 stretch drops her thought, bodily listening, memory, and self-assessment long enough for the scene to flatten away from lived focalization.
findings.rewrite_direction: Re-anchor the recorder sequence inside Marisol's body and working mind by inserting close-third beats around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:57, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:65 before the return at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:69. Use bodily sensation, operational association, or involuntary memory so the testimony keeps accruing through her rather than as free-floating transcript.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passage between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:47 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:69 contains at least two Marisol-centered beats of thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment, and no run longer than five consecutive paragraphs plays without focalizer interiority. Fail if the tape still reads as an uninterrupted Q-and-A block until line 69.

findings.problem: A negation-then-correction sentence shape becomes a visible tic: 'not X, just Y' or near-variants recur across the chapter's pivots. After the third instance, the construction stops feeling chosen and starts announcing the prose's own self-correction pattern.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the landings at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:81, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:119, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:153, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:183, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:207. Keep at most one or two negation-correction beats; convert the others into direct assertions or different rhythmic turns so each moment lands on its own terms.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if those revised lines contain no more than two negation-correction constructions of the form 'not X, just Y,' 'It was not X. It was just Y,' or equivalent near-variants, while the physical fact in each beat remains immediately legible. Fail if three or more such self-correcting pivots remain in the cited spans.

summary: Booker and dialogue pass: the outage-held recorder scene lands the required ethical enlargement, the witness voices stay distinct, and the chapter remains aligned with the style bible's past-tense, concrete, body-close mode. Craft and prose fail on one focalization lapse in the first recorder block and one repeated sentence tic; no MEDIUM+ continuity contradiction, sanitization drift, tense drift, or dialogue-register breach surfaced.
